name: BFL FLUX Image Generation
description: Generate and edit photorealistic images with Black Forest Labs FLUX 2 models (Pro, Max, Klein 4B/9B, Flex). One tool covers text-to-image AND image editing — pass file_ref or image_url to enable edit mode. Async polling: most generations finish in <25s and return the image inline; longer jobs return a polling_url for follow-up with wait_for_image.

credentials_required.label: BFL API Key
credentials_required.hint: Get at https://api.bfl.ai/ -> Account -> API Keys. Pay-per-generation via BFL credits (1 credit = $0.01).

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate a single image with FLUX 2. Covers text-to-image and editing (pass file_ref of a user-uploaded photo OR image_url of a previous generation). Returns the image inline if ready within ~25s, otherwise returns a polling_url for wait_for_image.

tools.name: wait_for_image
tools.description: Continue waiting for a FLUX generation that did not finish in the initial 25s window. Call repeatedly with the SAME polling_url until you get the file.

tools.name: get_credits
tools.description: Return remaining BFL credit balance (1 credit = $0.01 USD).

author: freddy-schuetz
